scripts.db:apply:local: for f in 001_init 002_seed 003_beroepen 004_extra 005_pages; do wrangler d1 execute beroepenavond --local --file=schema/$f.sql; done
scripts.db:apply:remote: for f in 001_init 002_seed 003_beroepen 004_extra 005_pages; do wrangler d1 execute beroepenavond --remote --file=schema/$f.sql; done
